DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANTS AMERICAN ECONOMY INSURANCE COMPANY, LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY and SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
